examples: In a vehicle with manual transmission, downshift as you reduce speed.
Your status or your dating prospects may be affected if you downshift and others do not.
In a vehicle with manual transmission, you may downshift into a lower gear as you slow down.
She eased into the downshift, starting a hobby as a beekeeper with two hives.
The car is still silky smooth in corners, although in Sport you can actually get the back tires to spin after a downshift.
